title: Cádiz, Andalusia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Cádiz, Andalusia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Cádiz is a city in Andalusia with a population of 116,000. One of Europe’s oldest continuously inhabited cities, a beautiful peninsula city with stunning beaches and vibrant carnival.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
